| [AgriFoodInsightLogs](agrifoodinsightlogs.md)<p>Logs for read operations on FarmBeats resources such as insights and inisight-attachments. | resources | LogManagement | No| -|
| [AgriFoodJobProcessedLogs](agrifoodjobprocessedlogs.md)<p>Logs indicating success or failure of job runs for farmOperationDataIngestionJob, farmOperationPeriodicJob, farmOperationEventHandlingJob,satelliteDataIngestionJob, weatherDataIngestionJob etc. These logs also contain reasons for failure of these jobs if any. | resources | LogManagement | No| [Yes](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/queries/agrifoodjobprocessedlogs)|

| [AgriFoodProviderAuthLogs](agrifoodproviderauthlogs.md)<p>Logs for create, update, delete, cascade delete get and get all for oauth providers. It also has logs for get, get all and cascade delete for oauth tokens. | resources | LogManagement | No| -|
| [AgriFoodSatelliteLogs](agrifoodsatellitelogs.md)<p>Logs for create and get operations for Satellite data. | resources | LogManagement | No| -|

| [AgriFoodWeatherLogs](agrifoodweatherlogs.md)<p>Logs for create, update, delete and get operations while ingesting weather data in FarmBeats. | resources | LogManagement | No| -|
